title: Unused labels should be removed
description: Unused labels should be removedAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode Smellbased-on-misracertunusedWhy is this an issue?More InfoIf a label is declared but not used in the program, it can be considered as dead code and should therefore be removed.This will improve maintainability as developers will not wonder what this label is used for.Noncompliant code examplevoid fun() { label: doSomething(); }Compliant solutionvoid fun() { doSomething(); }Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CIDeveloper EditionAvailable Since9.1©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Unused labels should be removed. Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
